name: sdlc-workflow
description: AI-driven SDLC automation pipeline (proposal → apply → qa → accept → pr) with optional dual-model review gates and Playwright browser QA.

interface.shortDescription: Five-stage SDLC pipeline: proposal → apply → qa → accept → pr
interface.longDescription: Drive software delivery through a contract-based SDLC: requirement breakdown with a human review gate, optional Codex design/code review, unit tests, Playwright browser QA, local commit, and PR. Existing projects are intake-baselined so the agent doesn't rebuild your structure.
defaultPrompt: 用 sdlc-workflow 给这个项目做 init
用 sdlc-workflow 跑 proposal：增加用户登录模块
